# Let's open the uploaded file and inspect its content.
path1 = "/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt"
path2 = "/mnt/data/file-2XqmqtVFAHUoVDv3gCyb9B-text_to_analyse.txt"

import os, sys, json, re

content = None
used_path = None
for p in [path1, path2]:
    try:
        with open(p, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
            used_path = p
            break
    except Exception as e:
        pass

used_path, content[:5000]

import re, json

text = content

def find_all_occurrences(text, sub):
    # return list of start indices where text.substr==sub
    starts = []
    i = 0
    while True:
        idx = text.find(sub, i)
        if idx == -1:
            break
        starts.append(idx)
        i = idx + 1  # allow overlapping if any, though not needed
    return starts

# Candidate phrases:
candidates = [
    "فَما كانَ جَوابَ قَوْمِهِ إِلَّا أَنْ قالُوا اقْتُلُوهُ أَوْ حَرِّقُوهُ فَأَنْجاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ النَّارِ إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ",
    "فَأَنْجاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ النَّارِ",
    "إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ",
    "فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ",
    "فِي الآخرة لَمِنَ الصالحين",
]

occurrences = {}
for sub in candidates:
    occ = find_all_occurrences(text, sub)
    occurrences[sub] = occ

occurrences

def ctx(start, end=None, width=120):
    if end is None:
        end = start+1
    s = max(0, start-width)
    e = min(len(text), end+width)
    return text[s:e]

# Context around 530
print(ctx(530, 530+len("فَأَنْجاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ النَّارِ")))

# Context around 684
print("----")
print(ctx(684, 684+len("إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ")))

# Context around 1056 and 1091 and 1141
print("----")
for pos, phrase in [(1056, "فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ"), (1091, "فِي الآخرة لَمِنَ الصالحين"), (1141, "فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ")]:
    print(ctx(pos, pos+len(phrase)))
    print("----")

# Compute spans for the chosen occurrences
spans = []

def add_span(start, sub, citation_type):
    end = start + len(sub)
    assert text[start:end] == sub, (start, sub, text[start:end])
    spans.append({
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": sub,
        "citation_type": citation_type
    })

# 1. Main ayah full phrase
full_ayah = "فَما كانَ جَوابَ قَوْمِهِ إِلَّا أَنْ قالُوا اقْتُلُوهُ أَوْ حَرِّقُوهُ فَأَنْجاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ النَّارِ إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ"
add_span(occurrences[full_ayah][0], full_ayah, "Aya")

# 2. Isolated phrases in [1]
add_span(530, "فَأَنْجاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ النَّارِ", "Aya")
add_span(684, "إِنَّ فِي ذلِكَ لَآياتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ", "Aya")

# 3. Phrases in [2]
add_span(1056, "فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ", "Aya")
add_span(1091, "فِي الآخرة لَمِنَ الصالحين", "Aya")
add_span(1141, "فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ", "Aya")

spans, len(text)
